content: Backend — add theme + typography fields to Settings (bg/surface/text/accent + serif/sans/mono font names + accent style)
Frontend — rewrite index.css + PublicLayout to apply theme CSS variables from settings (live re-theming)
Frontend — restyle Home to match reference exactly (dark obsidian hero, italic serif, gold last-word accent, right-side gold orb, uppercase nav, bottom meta strip)
Frontend — restyle Services, Athletes, Orgs, Family, Approach, About, Press to dark theme matching reference
Frontend — add /orgs and /family route aliases (Sports Advisory → Organizations, Strategic Advisory → Family)
Frontend — admin Theme panel in Settings (color pickers + font name inputs + live preview)
Test — verify reference fidelity and theme controls work
